ordered online and had it delivered the same day packaged nicely clean purchased for the features ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ love the padding and comfort for my mo love that there is so many adjustment options and will grow with my little one i most definitely feel like my baby is safe in this seat i love the little hooks on the sides that hold the straps while you put your baby in and out where has this been all my life makes an already pain in the butt task so much easier 
i appreciate the padding on the shoulder harness and the padding on the bottom buckle the removable double cupholders and the cupholder that has a snack holder is impressive and very useful not a fan of character products or gaudy loud crazy prints  colors so the subtle simple colors of this seat really compliments and is appreciated the back opening for the seatbelt is not meant for big hands to go through so men might need a lady to handle that part but i had no issues the dual bottom anchors are sturdy and tough quality that seat does not budge i would not purchase this if you plan on sharing or having to move it between cars it is a bit bulky and a little heavy but my yo lb boy  my yo lb girl fit in the back of my door elantra just fine 👍🏻⭐ we are happy with this purchase

i returned this after owning for just over a month purchased end of july returned early sept the styrofoam became completely detached from the actual car seat and i have no idea how it is fashioned to the seat with what looks like hot glue and the glue has not held it together this is not supposed to happen even during impactaccident i thank god that i just happened to notice this while transferring the seat to a different car the seat even says “do not remove” yet it removed itself if you are considering buying this car seat please look at other options to spend your hard earned money a broken neck or worse is simply not worth it this seat could cause your child to be killed during an accident

the gi joe classified series night force falcon and quarrel pack is a highly anticipated set for fans of both vintage characters and modern action figure craftsmanship this set brings a fresh yet nostalgic update to two iconic characters—lt falcon and quarrel—who come from different parts of the gi joe universe but pair well here thanks to the lines night force theme

lt falcon
night force falcon stands out with a new gritty look compared to earlier versions his sculpt captures the essence of a stealthy nononsense special ops soldier details like tactical gear a beret and a more rugged face sculpt give him a seasoned battleready appearance the paintwork is solid with dark greens and blacks fitting the night force aesthetic articulation is on par with other classified series figures with a wide range of motion in the arms legs and torso the accessories including a rifle and removable knife add to the realistic feel and give falcon multiple posing options for display

quarrel
quarrel is an exciting inclusion for fans of the action force side of the gi joe universe with her striking color scheme—bright greens blacks and yellows—she is both eyecatching and authentic to her original european design the figures proportions facial sculpt and accessory loadout feel like a modern homage to her classic look her articulation mirrors falcons allowing for various poses and action stances that make her a standout figure on any shelf she comes equipped with a crossbow and additional accessories giving her a unique loadout compared to other joes

overall quality  presentation
the gi joe classified night force falcon and quarrel pack impresses on all fronts from design quality and character accuracy to articulation and accessory choices the combination of these two characters in a night force theme feels thoughtful and adds another layer to their story potential whether you are a diehard gi joe collector or just looking for standout figures this pack delivers

the setup process was very easy and did not require any additional software all you need to do is insert the batteries two aaa batteries for the mouse and two for the keyboard and plug the nano receiver into the computers usb port and you are all set both units will then be instantly recognized by the system

the mouse is small and seems to be well suitable for small hands which i like the two aaa batteries adds weight to the mouse and makes it more controllable in my opinion the keystrokes does not need much pressure and are very accurate and responsive no delays or stuttering whatsoever the mouse was also responsive as well

the keyboard and mouse can function independently they both have their own separate power switches and you can use either one or the other or both at the same time also this wireless keyboard and mouse combo have very good operational range i tested it at  feet but i am almost certain that they both can exceed that distance

this wireless unit has a full keyboard layout and you pretty much have all the functions that you would expect from an average corded keyboard and this includes volume controls music playback buttons etc


the following are the only complaints that i have

 no backlights for low light usage
 the fn key does not have a lockable mechanism thus requiring two hands to operate a given function ie you have to hold down the fn key with one hand and the desired function key with the other hand
 no sleep function to save battery life


however those are not necessarily deal breakers and i find this keyboardmouse to be an excellent value for the modest price the keyboard is very comfortable typing on and while the mouse do not have any variable dpi settings it still seems to be calibrated just right as is

the manufacturer states that the batteries can last for up to four months for the mouse and eight months for the keyboard but i am not able to verify those claims because i have only been using this keyboardmouse daily for about a week or so nevertheless this combo appears to be very durable and i easily recommend it

i like the ease of the keys on the keyboard and mouse  plug and play connection  wireless units is a big plus  the mouse response is very sensitive so beware you must adjust with your system  all in all i am well pleased with this combo  recommend

the beats by dr dre solo buds are a remarkable addition to the world of wireless earbuds offering a blend of style comfort and impressive sound quality 

design and comfort 
the earbuds feature a sleek and modern design that is instantly recognizable they come in various colors allowing users to express their personal style the ergonomic design ensures a snug fit making them comfortable for extended listening sessions the lightweight construction means you can wear them for hours without discomfort

sound quality 
one of the standout features of the solo buds is their sound quality they deliver rich bass and clear highs making them suitable for a variety of music genres the noise isolation is effective allowing users to immerse themselves in their music without distractions from the outside world

battery life 
battery life is impressive with several hours of playtime on a single charge the quick charging feature is a bonus ensuring that you can get back to your music in no time 

connectivity 
the bluetooth connectivity is seamless with a quick pairing process range and stability are commendable allowing for a hasslefree listening experience

final thoughts 
overall the beats by dr dre solo buds are a solid choice for anyone looking for highquality wireless earbuds they combine style comfort and excellent sound performance making them a worthy investment for music lovers whether you are commuting working out or just relaxing at home these earbuds deliver an enjoyable listening experience

product review beats solo headphones

rating 

i had high expectations for the beats solo headphones but unfortunately they turned out to be one of the most disappointing purchases i have made

sound quality
to be fair the sound quality is decent the bass is strong and clear and the overall audio performance is what you would expect from beats however good sound does not make up for the massive flaws in functionality

major issues
		case fails to charge headphones
the charging case is essentially useless despite being a critical accessory for wireless headphones it does not reliably charge the headphones which is incredibly frustrating
		connectivity problems
the headphones disconnect whenever the case is not nearby even if my phone is right next to me this defeats the entire purpose of having wireless headphones why should the case dictate their connectivity when the phone is the actual source device
		unreliable functionality
these issues make the headphones practically unusable for everyday activities constant disconnects and charging issues disrupt the experience to the point where i would rather use wired headphones or a different brand entirely

final verdict
beats solo headphones are far from the premium product they claim to be while the sound is decent the functional shortcomings—especially the flawed charging case and constant connectivity issues—make them an absolute dealbreaker these are by far the worst headphones i have tried from beats i am highly disappointed and will be returning them

recommendation
look elsewhere if you want reliable wireless headphones beats solo headphones are simply not worth the frustration

vrmr tech hits a high note with this system  as an owner of an htc vive system that i have as yet to unpack after a recent move it has been outclassed and outpaced

vr tracking without a pair of external devices  check
mixed reality in full color  check
wide variety of available software and games  check
ability to link with your computer and use it for additional vr experiences  check
plethora of peripheral products to enhance your experience  check

the sheer freedom of movement while online is incredible  no wires necessary  setup for vr boundaries ensuring you will not crash into furniture etc while playing is a snap and so easy  all you have to do is look around while in setup mode the headset does all the mapping  just stay in welllit areas

unfortunately there is a downside to that freedom the battery that comes with the headset will fade quickly  two hours of play and you are out for two to three hours  there are a few ways around that  one i recommend highly the others not so much

  purchase a replacement for the head strap the system comes with many replacements are available on the market  some come with additional battery power
  purchase a lengthy usbc chargingdata cable both i found one that is  feet long  
    a  use that cable to link to a pc meta does this easily with this system  it will slow down the battery usage possibly stop it if you have the right computer connection
     b  use that cable to plug directly into a wall socket with an appropriate adapter  headset will not lose charge

i would go with option  with batteries and if you can get additional fastcharging batteries you will not need more than  total for a very long time in vr  but all things in moderation  option a is good for those like me that used pc vr in the past and have a variety of games to play on steam  i have my pinball game back
option b while a little cheaper than  your physical movements are limited by that cord and there will be times that it frustrates you because it will get in the way

the one thing i do not like

there is supposed to be a wireless pc link available  for me and others it is unreliable with my network and setup  there are other programs you can purchase that can make it possible to work on your desktop wirelessly but getting vr to work with them has proven unreliable

i like carrying a real camera with me just something small i can throw in my purse to capture the moment if needed there is just something about a point and shoot rather than your phone anyway this is a handy little camera to bring along it is easy to use has a good zoom good battery life and most importantly takes good pictures

it is so cute it will not take higher resolution pics without a micro sd card get a smaller one or be ready to format your large capacity micro sd card does not fare well in low light it also looks adorable dangling from my purse it feels more secure to hand off this camera for someone to take a pic for you in case of theft from a stranger or a nosy friend going through phone contents

my first digital camera was a kodak easyshare c i liked the quality of the photos and the easy to to use aspect of it after many years of use i upgraded to an expensive point and shoot digital camera made by a well known higher end company that i used for a few years before i started having trouble getting the buttons to do what was needed to do for instance i was stuck on  mp resolution and had to put tape over the flash if i did not want it i have been using my phone camera with a  mp triple lens for the last couple of years but have never adjusted to holding it still while i touched the dot to take the picture i started wishing i had a point and shoot  camera that had a lot of features and that would not have to be answered if it rang enter the kodak pixpro fz this digital camera slightly smaller and slightly lighter than the easyshare c they have managed to make it a tad thinner as well after setting it up it is initially in the auto mode which works very well for most casual photo taking without having to make any adjustments all of the attached photos were taken in this mode except of course the first one that was taken with a different camera i would guess that     of the folks that buy this camera will never get deep into the manual to utilize this camera to it is fullest capabilities my advice is the download the manual at httpsuskodakpixprocomfzusermanual to be able to see what it is capable of doing there is really too much to include in this review so i will just relate my experience i think that this is a fantastic camera for the price range i am not a professional photographer so the specs are plenty good enough for me it would be a good idea to invest in a sdsdhcsdxl class  memory card of between gb  gb capacity because the internal memory is not very big and will not hold many photos this is the only digital camera i can think of that allows the use of either alkaline or nimh rechargable aa batteries just like the c instead of a proprietary and usually expensive battery that must be recharged installed in the camera i plan to use four aa rechargable batteries that i already own two in the camera and two ready charged spares the camera itself is smaller though thicker than my cell phone and it has mp resolution as opposed to my phones mp the buttons on the back are easy to operate and the photo and video buttons are just the right size to avoid accidental shots i have taken some photos and video using the auto setting and are very happy with the results the camera hooks up to my computer using a standard micro usb cable instead of the special cable that other cameras require and it appears as a device immediately on my windows  laptop which makes copying and transfering quick and easy i like the way the camera feels in my hand but if i wanted to use a tripod it has a standard tripod threaded receiver on the bottom i can see with all of the advanced features this camera has to offer that it will take a bit of a learning curve for me to get the most out of it until then i can use it on auto for all of my needs as i learn the functions we will be spending a week up north with the kids and grand kids this year for christmas and i will be using it to document the whole event

pros
 sleek design the onn iphone  case boasts a sleek and stylish design that perfectly complements the phones aesthetics it adds a touch of sophistication while still maintaining a slim profile
 excellent protection this case provides robust protection for your iphone  against everyday wear and tear including scratches bumps and minor drops the durable materials offer peace of mind knowing your device is wellprotected
 precise fit the case fits the iphone  snugly with precise cutouts for the camera ports and buttons it does not add unnecessary bulk allowing for easy access to all functions without compromising usability
 enhanced grip the textured finish on the case enhances grip reducing the risk of accidental slips and drops it feels comfortable to hold providing added security when using your phone on the go
 affordable price with its budgetfriendly price tag the onn iphone  case offers exceptional value for money without compromising on quality it is a great option for those looking for a reliable and affordable protective case

cons
 limited color options while the cases design is stylish some users may prefer more color options to match their personal style or preferences
 moderate impact protection while the case provides excellent protection against everyday bumps and scratches it may not offer the same level of protection against highimpact drops or accidents users with a more rugged lifestyle may want to consider additional protective measures

overall the onn iphone  case from walmart is a reliable choice for anyone seeking a combination of style and protection for their device with its sleek design precise fit and affordable price it offers great value for money and is sure to keep your iphone  safe and secure

nickwatch review a sleek fusion of functionality and style

i recently had the opportunity to try out the nickwatch and i have to say it is a fantastic addition to my tech lineup as someone who appreciates both design and performance in wearables the nickwatch definitely stands out in a crowded market here is why

 design  build quality
first off the nickwatchs design is sleek and modern with a minimalist aesthetic that looks great both in casual settings and more professional environments the watch features a smooth durable case feels premium without being overly heavy and a variety of stylish band options that allow for personal customization whether you prefer leather silicone or metal the watch can be dressed up or down depending on the occasion the screen itself is vibrant and crisp with clear visibility even in bright sunlight
display
the nickwatch sports an oled display that is bright responsive and sharp the touchscreen interface is intuitive and smooth to navigate making it easy to access apps notifications and settings i love how it is not overly cluttered — you can access what you need quickly without diving into endless menus there is also a customizable watch face so you can personalize the look to fit your mood or style

performance  features
under the hood the nickwatch packs a punch with impressive performance the watch has a solid processor that allows for quick response times and i have not experienced any lag or stutter during normal use as far as features go it comes with all the essentials fitness tracking heart rate monitoring sleep analysis and gps the builtin health and fitness suite is a huge plus for anyone looking to keep track of their daily activity and wellness goals 

i particularly enjoy the accuracy of the step counter and heart rate monitor which seem to be spoton compared to other devices i have used it also includes some more niche features like stress tracking and guided breathing exercises which are surprisingly helpful for maintaining a sense of wellbeing during the day

battery life
one of the most impressive things about the nickwatch is its battery life despite the bright display and featurepacked experience i have consistently gotten around two days of usage on a full charge even with heavy notifications and fitness tracking that is far better than many other smartwatches i have tried which often require charging daily

connectivity  app integration
the nickwatch integrates smoothly with both ios and android devices syncing effortlessly with my phone to push notifications for calls messages emails and social media updates the integration with fitness apps is also excellent allowing you to export your data to popular platforms like strava google fit and apple health

verdict
overall the nickwatch is an impressive wearable that combines modern design useful features and solid performance
